Together with the §11.10 `.vercel/project.json` resync (`#P01-followup-correction`) this fully closes the project drift opened in §11.9 / §11.10 and removes the surface area for env mis-edit on a wrong project.
- 2026-04-26 — `#P03` CLOSED: `/api/cart` GET aligned with live `ProductVendor` schema. Old code used `where: { isActive: true }` and `select: { inStock: true }` neither of which exist on `ProductVendor`. Replaced with `select: { priceInKRW, stockStatus }` and derived response `inStock` as `stockStatus !== "OUT_OF_STOCK"` (fail-open). Cart route returns 200 with empty cart for the pilot owner; verified pre-§11.16 deploy. Commit `efc4ed42`.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.16 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P02-e2e-blocker` — sourcing → quote inlet fake-success + dead path normalised (commit `f230d817`). Pure composer + result-driven toast resolver replace the silent `return` + unconditional `toast.success` pattern. 13/13 vitest pass; production probe on deploy `dpl_FXHdWJYiw9EkwaHJ2eT7YrR7QfUs` confirms vendor-pending now produces a real candidacy row, the toast tells the truth, and the workbench preserves "검토 필요 / 가격 미확인 / 벤더 미지정" all the way to `/app/quote/request`. Three new followups OPENED in §11.16: `#P02-followup-quote-403` (POST /api/quotes 403 from `enforceAction` deny — blocks Phase 1.3 verification only), `#P02-followup-pilot-vendor-catalog` (15-product vendor backfill), `#P02-followup-compare-fake-success` (7 same-pattern sites in compare/page.tsx).
- 2026-04-26 — `#P02-followup-compare-fake-success` CLOSED (commit `c4f526fb`). 6 callsites in `apps/web/src/app/test/compare/page.tsx` switched to `resolveAddToQuoteToast` from §11.16. shadcn `useToast` `default | destructive` variant maps cleanly onto the 3-success / 1-error result modes. Bulk-add CTA (L1365) aggregates per-product result tallies into a single honest summary toast instead of one optimistic line per product. tsc on changed surface: 0 errors. `compare` flow's same-shape fake-success risk closed.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.17 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P01-followup-migrate-ci` — drift-detector trk attempted and dropped. 4 commits (`0b4130e → 48703b0 → af0317e → 1212e6c8`) iterated through `npx prisma` → `pnpm exec` → `pnpm --filter web exec` → `npm ci + npx --no-install`. Run #4 finally got past install/postinstall but `prisma migrate status` hung on Supabase pooler `:6543` connection for 8m 37s before timeout-minutes: 10 killed it. **Field-validated that the §11.9 / §11.12 generic-CI-unreachable result generalises to GitHub Actions runners**, not just Vercel build infra. The whole drift-detector premise (query production DB from external CI) has no surface under the current Supabase network policy. Reverted to status quo. §11.13 operator-shell-only migrate stays canonical; the "operator forgets to migrate" weak spot is now explicitly an operator-discipline accountability item, not an automatable safety net.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.18 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P02-followup-quote-403` — env-only fix, no code change. Read-only audit traced the 403 to `csrf-contract.ts:151-152` (`origin_mismatch` / `missing_origin`) caused by missing `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL` env var: production trusted origins reduced to localhost-only, so every production browser-origin mutation was blocked under `full_enforce`. Operator added `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL = https://bio-insight-lab-web.vercel.app` and redeployed (`dpl_DmVgbZH4Pa6DgVSz42eauxtfAMHT`). Production probe: `POST /api/quotes` 403 → 201 CREATED, Quote `cmofbcxj30003usrss33mupfl` persisted in `org-pilot-internal` with `vendor: null` (vendor-pending preserved). New followup `#P02-followup-quote-number-missing` OPENED — `createQuote()` does not assign `quoteNumber`, and the conversion-queue endpoint filters `quoteNumber: { not: null }`, so newly created quotes are invisible in the queue.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.19 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P02-followup-quote-number-missing` — utility extraction `lib/api/quote-number.ts` (commit `4d03d99e`). 6/6 vitest pass. `createQuote()` Normal path now updates fresh quotes with a generated `Q-YYYYMMDD-{cuid-tail}` quoteNumber; `from-cart` route refactored onto the same utility (and a dead inline sequence-based `generateQuoteNumber()` removed). Production probe on deploy `dpl_7E4ecYkagHxzDZuqSA3MqKTb62KK`: `POST /api/quotes` returns `quoteNumber: "Q-20260426-9AYHTZ"`, and `GET /api/work-queue/purchase-conversion` shows `stats.total: 0 → 1` with `conversionStatus: "review_required"` for the new quote. **§11.16 Phase 1.3 is now genuinely verified end-to-end**: sourcing → quote → conversion-queue chain renders correctly in the pilot tenant with vendor-pending state preserved at every step.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.20 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P02-followup-pilot-vendor-catalog` — minimum vendor fixture (commit `32e1280b`). Pilot tenant gains 1 Vendor (Thermo Fisher Scientific) + 15 ProductVendor links via the existing pilot-seed transaction (operator-shell run per §11.13). Production probe verified the symmetric vendor-present path: `/app/search` shows priceInKRW + leadTime + vendor name (no "견적 필요"), "견적 담기" click hits the canonical `added` toast (₩45,000 footer), `/app/quote` displays "Thermo Fisher Scientific" group with full request-ready surface, `POST /api/quotes` persists vendorName in the snapshot (`Q-20260426-0WX80L`), and `/api/work-queue/purchase-conversion` shows `stats.total: 1 → 2` with vendor-pending and vendor-present quotes coexisting and resolved independently. **The `#P02` track is now fully closed.** The pilot tenant exercises both vendor branches end-to-end on real data; any further gap opens against `#P03`+.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.21 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-D session A` — `Quote.selectedReplyId` persistence (commits `8fdb3e8f` schema + endpoint + UI; `f2281614` lock-release fix). Schema migration applied via session pooler `:5432` after the operator hit a stale `DIRECT_URL` reference on `:6543`. Production probe round 1 surfaced an enforcement-lock leak: 400 early-return paths skipped `enforcement.fail()` and a follow-up POST on the same quote returned 409. Round 2 fix added `enforcement.fail()` to every 4xx return below the enforceAction line and upgraded test mocks from no-op to call-count spies so the regression is reproducible at unit-test level. Round 2 verified: bogus replyId → 400, same quote `replyId: null` → 200 (idempotent un-select), conversion-queue `selectedOptionId` field present and `null` for both existing pilot quotes (no regression). Real-user positive-select path is deferred to natural traffic (no real `QuoteReply` rows in pilot yet); unit tests cover the happy path. Session B (`bulk-PO + ready_for_po decode`) is the natural successor.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.22 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-D session B` — bulk-PO conversion + selectedReplyId-based `ready_for_po` decode (commit `552c45af`). Resolver `deriveConversionStatus` gains a selectedReplyId short-circuit (43/43 tests). New endpoint `POST /api/work-queue/purchase-conversion/bulk-po` atomically converts a batch of ready_for_po quotes into Orders (9 tests, all 4xx assert lock release per §11.21 lesson). New utility `lib/api/order-number.ts` (`ORD-YYYYMMDD-{cuid-tail}`, mirror of §11.19 quote-number, 6 tests). UI "일괄 발주 전환" header CTA wired with `stats.ready_for_po > 0` visibility gate so the dead-button ban is preserved. **No schema migration required** — `Order` and `OrderItem` already existed. Production probe (deploy `dpl_fwHq2Xerg5Qs4wv2nGiySrRq5tic`) verified all negative paths (400 INVALID_INPUT, 404 QUOTE_MISSING, 409 NO_SELECTED_REPLY) with correct lock-release behavior; real-user positive bulk-PO probe deferred until pilot tenant has actual QuoteReply rows. **α-D track is now closed end-to-end** — operator can pick a reply, the queue promotes the quote to ready_for_po, and the bulk-PO CTA converts it to a real Order.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.23 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#SEC03` — `/test/*` middleware matcher omission (commit `4e6c304b`). Audit found two `/test/*` pages (`/test/analysis`, `/test/compare`) shipped without page-level useSession guards. Real-world risk was partial (downstream APIs are session-checked) but the page route should not rely on the API layer as its only gate. Fix added `/test/:path*` to the matcher AND to the page-auth branch — defense-in-depth. Standalone fix that does not depend on §11.24's rename, intentionally so.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.24 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#P03-test-prefix-cleanup` — `/test/*` → `/_workbench/*` rename (commit `566dc510`). 84 files renamed atomically via `git mv`; 5 external references replaced; middleware `/test/*` matcher entry retired (URL surface gone — Next.js treats `_`-prefixed folders as private). Production probe verified `/app/quote`, `/app/search`, `/app/compare`, `/app/quote/request` all return 200 (zero functional regression) while `/test/quote`, `/test/search`, `/test/analysis`, `/test/compare` all return 404 (URL surface eliminated). Defense-in-depth becomes structural: there is no URL for an unauthenticated request to even reach the unguarded pages — the §11.23 page-auth branch is now belt-and-suspenders, not the only gate.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.25 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-F` — LLM-backed AI 선택안 rationale enrichment (commits `8e8fe6e4` schema/utility/endpoint/resolver/UI; `b55ed0e3` security registry fix). Schema migration adds `RATIONALE_SUMMARY` to `AiActionType` enum (operator-shell migrate via session pooler). New utility `lib/ai/build-rationale.ts` wraps OpenAI gpt-4o with always-fallback semantics (8 unit tests). New endpoint `POST /api/ai-actions/generate/quote-rationale` persists per-(quoteId, optionId) rationale and caches; resolver `buildAiOptions` prefers persisted RATIONALE_SUMMARY rationale over the v0 placeholder (5 new resolver tests). UI: "AI 근거" button below each rationale line in the AI 선택안 rail. Production probe 1 of 8e8fe6e4 hit 500 because `ai_action_create` was missing from `IrreversibleActionType` union and `ACTION_ROLE_MINIMUM`; fix `b55ed0e3` registered both. Probe 2: first call → 200 + AiActionItem persisted + `fromCache: false`; second call → 200 + `fromCache: true` + identical rationale; both with `aiModel: null` (fallback path), confirming endpoint chain end-to-end including LabAxis dead-button discipline (utility never returns empty rationale). LLM real-call verification deferred to operator-side `OPENAI_API_KEY` env audit — same gap likely affects all existing ai-actions endpoints (quote-draft, vendor-email-draft, order-followup, reorder-suggestions). Tracked as `#α-F-followup-openai-key-audit`.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.26 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-F-followup-anthropic-migration` — full LLM Messages API migration to Anthropic Claude (`claude-haiku-4-5-20251001`) + Phase 6 OpenAI provider toggle (commits `2a309c42` Phase 1 wrapper + tests, `4cdedd66` Phase 2 build-rationale, `efe6dd06` Phase 3 openai.ts 3 fns, `cdf94ece` Phase 4 quote-draft-generator, `ca0c8f4c` Phase 5 datasheet/protocol/quote-ai extractors, `963d05bf` Phase 6 provider toggle). All 6 callers run through a single shared wrapper `lib/ai/anthropic.ts` (filename retained despite hosting both providers — module docstring acknowledges the misnomer). Phase 5 production probe surfaced Anthropic HTTP 400 `invalid_request_error: "Your credit balance is too low to access the Anthropic API."` via vercel runtime log keyword triangulation (`Anthropic API error 400` + `invalid_request_error` + `credit balance` all matched; `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set` + `authentication_error` + `not_found` did not — confirming the wrapper hit Anthropic correctly and the failure was billing, not code). Operator attempted to fund credits at `console.anthropic.com/settings/billing` via Claude in Chrome; despite all Stripe-iframe fields populated (Korean Mastercard, Seoul address, valid expiry/CVC) the "크레딧 USD 5 구매" submit button remained disabled — root cause unverifiable across cross-origin Stripe iframes (suspected Stripe Link account-creation gate or Korean card pre-rejection). Tracked as `#α-F-followup-anthropic-billing-blocker`. Phase 6 added `LABAXIS_AI_PROVIDER` env (`"anthropic"` default | `"openai"`) so the wrapper can dispatch to either provider with zero caller change; 7 new tests cover the OpenAI dispatch path bringing wrapper test count to 16 (29 total in `src/__tests__/lib/ai/`). First Phase 6 deploy `dpl_71AXFgQ9...` ran with `LABAXIS_AI_PROVIDER` env present but value silently empty (Sensitive variable hide-on-edit pattern); operator re-entered `openai` via Claude in Chrome and triggered Vercel UI Redeploy → `dpl_8ELoAZCLm8...`. Final probe at 13:28:51 UTC: `/api/search/intent` 200 OK, level=empty, `openai.com` keyword match ✅, `credit balance` no match — Phase 6 dispatch verified end-to-end. Anthropic migration code lives, runtime runs on OpenAI; flip back is a 1-env-var operator action when billing is restored. Embeddings remain on OpenAI permanently (no Anthropic embedding API; `#α-F-followup-embedding-strategy`). **§11.25's `#α-F-followup-openai-key-audit` is subsumed by §11.26 — superseded.**
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.27 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#SEC04-ai-action-action-renames` — 4 ai-actions generate endpoints aligned onto the dedicated `ai_action_create` IrreversibleActionType (commit `65621f6a`, deploy `dpl_DG8p9RKtcjs3NR8zdbYwEpfpKJc3`, plan `docs/plans/PLAN_sec04-ai-action-action-renames.md`). Triggered by the `#α-F-followup-ai-actions-runtime-verify` Phase 0 audit which mapped: `quote-draft` overloaded `'order_create'`, `vendor-email-draft` overloaded `'sensitive_data_export'`, `order-followup` and `reorder-suggestions` overloaded `'sensitive_data_import'`. Phase 0 audit also revealed only 2 of the 4 endpoints actually call an LLM (`quote-draft`, `vendor-email-draft`); the other 2 (`order-followup`, `reorder-suggestions`) are deterministic detectors with no `lib/ai/anthropic.ts` coupling — correcting §11.25's earlier assumption that all 4 shared the same OPENAI_API_KEY gap. SEC04 minimal-diff scope intentionally covers only the 4 ai-actions endpoints; the codebase-wide overload (`'sensitive_data_import'` is the catch-all default mutation label across 60+ sites including `/api/search/intent`, `/api/products/*`, `/api/inventory/*`, `/api/vendor/*`, `/api/work-queue/*`) is parked as `#SEC05-action-label-codebase-wide-cleanup`. Phase 1 swap atomic across 4 routes; vitest 29/29 PASS, tsc --noEmit on the 4 routes → 0 errors. Side observation: 2 of the 4 routes had CRLF line endings; Edit-tool driven 4-line swap normalised them to LF, surfacing as 358/364 lines in `git diff --stat` despite 1-line semantic change — accepted as incidental cleanup. Phase 2 production runtime probe via Claude in Chrome was deferred at §11.27 close because the header CTA "견적 요청 초안 만들기" produced CSRF 403 + AiActionButton silent no-op on retry. **§11.28 directly addresses that blocker and re-opens the §11.27 runtime probe — see below.** Open followups: `#α-F-followup-anthropic-billing-blocker` (operator unblock, not blocking production), `#α-F-followup-embedding-strategy` (Anthropic has no embedding API — OpenAI permanent), **`#α-F-followup-ai-actions-runtime-verify` Phase 1 / option A** (AiActionButton CSRF auto-renewal — natural successor track ★ closed by §11.28), and `#SEC05-action-label-codebase-wide-cleanup` (open-ended, not P1).
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.28 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-F-followup-csrf-fetch-sweep` — AI actions cluster `raw fetch` → `csrfFetch` migration (commit `d258aa2f`, deploy `dpl_4Z8zWtZn1qPCHyDQRMPyQcy2q3ek`). Closes the AiActionButton dead-button blocker that §11.27 Phase 2 ran into. Diagnosis followed labaxis-bug-hunter's Truth Reconciliation → Hypothesis (4 candidates) → Validation (read-only file inspection) → Root Cause Confirmation flow: `apps/web/src/components/ai/ai-action-button.tsx:48,83` and 4 sites in `hooks/use-ai-actions.ts` + `hooks/use-work-queue.ts` were calling raw `fetch()` directly, bypassing the `csrfFetch` wrapper that auto-attaches `x-labaxis-csrf-token` for state-changing methods. Result: every POST landed in `enforceAction`'s `!csrfPassed` branch (`enforcement-middleware.ts:569`) → 403 with the Korean message exactly matching what the operator saw on screen. The 2 hooks were in mixed state — generate/* endpoints already used csrfFetch (lines 232/257/283), but `{id}/approve` and `{id}` patch operations did not. Phase 0 audit also surfaced 11 more raw POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE sites in 4 other clusters (Quote intake / Quote dispatch / Inventory / Billing / Reviews / Vendor portal), retained as scope-bounded follow-ups under `#α-F-followup-csrf-fetch-sweep` Phase 2+ if production dead-button recurs on those surfaces (operator preference: narrow A scope per cluster, not codebase-wide one-shot). Phase 1 minimal-diff swap (sed-based, line endings preserved): +7/-6 lines across 3 files. vitest 29/29 PASS, tsc --noEmit on 3 modified files → 0 errors. Production probe via Claude in Chrome on `dpl_4Z8zWtZn1qPCHyDQRMPyQcy2q3ek`: header CTA "견적 요청 초안 만들기" click → POST /api/ai-actions/generate/quote-draft → **201 Created** (was 403 pre-Phase 1) + AiActionItem persisted + AiDraftPreviewDialog rendered with full Korean LLM-generated email content ("Trypsin-EDTA 100ml 외 2건 견적 초안 완성" title; "[견적요청] Trypsin-EDTA 100ml 외 2건" subject; full 안녕하세요 / 아래 품목에 대해 견적을 요청드립니다 / 희망 납기일: 2026-05-10 body). Network log shows clean before/after evidence: pre-Phase 1 request status 403; post-Phase 1 request status 201 — same URL, same operator, same role; the only delta is csrfFetch attaching the CSRF header. **End-to-end verification chain complete:** §11.26 wrapper dispatch → §11.27 ai_action_create role policy → §11.28 csrfFetch wiring → AiActionItem persistence → LLM-generated content → preview dialog → operator approval gate. SEC04 §11.27 Phase 2 deferred runtime probe is hereby closed via §11.28.
- 2026-04-26 — **§11.29 OPENED and CLOSED:** Human-in-the-Loop policy reaffirmed for external counterparty side-effects (no commit; product policy entry only). Operator (호영) explicitly chose to keep the `executeXxx` approval-gate pattern for any LabAxis ai-action that writes externally (vendor email, third-party API, payment, regulatory submission), after a product-strategy discussion comparing LabAxis to Palantir Foundry / AIP / Apollo. Palantir reference clarified: their auto-execution scope is overwhelmingly **internal mutation + reversible** (Ontology Actions, ETL pipelines, Workshop autonomous mode); external counterparty side-effects are nearly always behind a review gate even there, and AIP agent action scopes are admin-whitelisted. LabAxis blast-radius for a wrong RFQ is asymmetric (vendor relationship damage, price leak, no compliance team to absorb recovery cost), so the same gate applies even more strongly. Existing code already aligned: every `executeXxx` in `/api/ai-actions/[id]/approve/route.ts` writes only to internal DB tables; one (`executeFollowupDraft`) carries the verbatim comment "(Human-in-the-Loop 원칙)". Future ai-action types must respect this policy; lower-friction patterns (optimistic + cancel window, trust ladder, bounded auto-send allowlist) each require their own §11.x entry with rationale + scope + rollback path before adoption. UX efficiency tracks (e.g., 30s cancel window) deferred until ≥6 months of operator data (approve %, edit %, time-to-dispatch) is collected. **No deployment, no code change.**

No external email send happens at this route (it persists `VendorRequest` rows; actual outbound dispatch remains a separate operator-driven step per §11.29 HIL policy). Remaining csrfFetch sweep clusters (Quote intake / Inventory / Billing / Reviews / Vendor portal) deferred per §11.28 — open per-cluster trks if production dead-button recurs on those surfaces.

Two of the four endpoints route through the §11.26 LLM wrapper (`parse-pdf`, `bom-parse`), making this the second cluster (after §11.28) where dead-button risk directly intersects LLM dispatch verification. Remaining clusters after §11.31: Billing (2 sites), Vendor portal (1 site, csrf-route-registry analysis required), Inventory (1 site), Reviews (2 sites) — each opens per-cluster trk if production dead-button recurs.

Highest blast-radius among remaining 4 clusters (payment failure = direct revenue loss) but **self-detecting on dead-button** (403 on payment is immediately visible to operator, unlike quote-intake silent loss) — that asymmetry is why §11.32 ranked 2nd, not 1st, in priority audit. csrfFetch is a strict superset of raw fetch (same contract + auto-header), cannot make a previously-working call fail. sed-based minimal-diff (+3/-2, line endings preserved); vitest `src/__tests__/lib/ai/` 29/29 PASS, tsc --noEmit on the 1 file → 0 errors. Remaining clusters after §11.32: Vendor portal (1 site, csrf-route-registry analysis required), Inventory (1 site), Reviews (2 sites).

- 2026-04-27 — **§11.35 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#α-F-followup-csrf-fetch-sweep` Phase 2F — "Vendor portal" cluster reclassified + swapped (final csrf-fetch-sweep cluster). Phase 0 audit (in §11.28) tentatively labeled this cluster "Vendor portal" with a flag for csrf-route-registry analysis before any swap. Phase 2F read-only inspection found the Phase 0 classification was wrong: `components/vendor/quote-form.tsx:103` calls `POST /api/vendor/requests/{id}/respond` (slash + "respond"), an **operator-surface session-authenticated route** that uses `auth() + enforceAction()` — not the public token-based vendor portal. The actual public-token route at `/api/vendor-requests/{token}/response` (dash + "response") sits at a separate URL/file with `isValidVendorRequestToken` auth and is already registered in `lib/security/csrf-route-registry.ts:47` as `{ reason: 'public_token_auth' }` (CSRF middleware bypass). `quote-form.tsx` is a dual-use component; the default branch (no `onSubmit` prop) targets the operator route, which is correctly subject to the standard CSRF stack. Drop-in csrfFetch swap is correct. sed-based minimal-diff (+2/-1, line endings preserved); vitest `src/__tests__/lib/ai/` 29/29 PASS, tsc --noEmit on the 1 file → 0 errors. **`#α-F-followup-csrf-fetch-sweep` is now FULLY CLOSED — all 17 raw POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE sites identified in §11.28 Phase 0 are processed (17/17).** Lessons logged in §11.35 main entry: URL slug similarity ≠ same auth model; csrf-route-registry should be consulted as truth for CSRF stack membership; dual-use components should be classified by default branch, not filename heuristics.

(e) `#operational-brief-narrative-cache` — AI narrative 재생성 비용 회피. (f) `#operational-brief-mobile-bottom-sheet` — 모바일 변종 (현재 desktop only `hidden md:flex`). **Lesson:** direction lock (§11.142) 후 implementation 진입 시 80%+ 이미 land 상태라 minimal-diff 4 항목만 필요. - 2026-04-29 — **§11.142 OPENED (direction lock + plan-deferred):** `#operational-brief-rail-direction-lock` — 호영님 Gemini AI Studio prototype 의 "AI 견적 분석" rail mock 을 LabAxis 제품 제약에 맞게 정리 + direction lock. **구현은 Phase B-α α-C 완료 후 별도 implementation 트랙 (§11.142-impl) 으로 진입.** **방향:** chatbot UI 금지, "**운영 브리핑**" (Operational Brief) 명칭 채택. Gmail/Gemini 식 "Ask AI" 가 아니라 LabAxis 식 **handoff surface** (work object 옆 rail/dock layer). **채택 (호영님 spec):** (1) 오른쪽 rail/dock 위치 (modal overlay X, 본문 블러 X — same-canvas 보존). (2) preset action chips only — `[상태 요약]` `[공급사 회신]` `[PO 전환]` `[차단 사유]`. (3) 4-section 구조: **상황 요약 / 핵심 근거 / 리스크 / 다음 조치**. (4) Primary CTA 1개 — `[견적 관리에서 계속]` (handoff). (5) 선택한 work object 컨텍스트 자동 — selection 부재 시 brief 미노출. **거부 (LabAxis 원칙 정합):** (a) 자유 채팅 입력창. (b) 좌측 사이드바의 standalone "AI 견적 분석" 메뉴 — page-per-feature 회귀 위험. AI 는 전면 메뉴가 아닌 운영 객체 옆 layer. (c) 본문 블러 + 오른쪽 modal assistant — same-canvas 위반. (d) AI status mutation — Quote.status / Order 생성 결정 등 canonical truth 변경 0. (e) `SELECTED OBJECT` 같은 internal raw label — "선택한 견적" 등 사람 언어로. (f) placeholder/dead button. **Canonical facts source mapping (호영님 lock):** UI 값 → source. `공급사 회신` = `Quote.replies[]`, `총 공급사 수` = `Quote.vendors[] / Quote.vendorRequests[]`, `AI 추천` = `AiActionItem / Quote.confidence`, `차단 상태` = `work-queue TaskStatus.BLOCKED / escalation`, `PO 상태` = `Order` 존재 여부, `다음 조치` = `ontology-next-action-resolver.ts`. AI 는 이 값을 **문장 압축만** — 상태 판단은 resolver. **Data flow:** `PurchaseConversionItem` (Phase B-α α-A) → `OperationalBrief adapter` → optional AI narrative (`/api/ai-actions/generate` 재사용) → right rail render. **sourceTrace 필수:** brief 마다 `{quoteId?, orderId?, workQueueTaskId?, aiActionItemId?, updatedAt}` 보존. **UI copy lock (한국어):** title `운영 브리핑`, object label `선택한 견적`, chips `상태 요약 / 공급사 회신 / PO 전환 / 차단 사유`, sections `상황 요약 / 핵심 근거 / 리스크 / 다음 조치`, primary CTA `견적 관리에서 계속`. **Phase B-α 의존 (현재 진척):** α-A `purchase-conversion-resolver.ts` (508 lines) ✅, α-B `/api/work-queue/purchase-conversion/route.ts` (+ bulk-po) ✅, α-C `/dashboard/purchases/page.tsx` 일부 land — α-C rewire 닫힌 후 §11.142-impl 진입. **§11.142-impl 첫 surface 1순위:** Purchase Conversion Queue rail/dock (Phase B-α 직접 연결, 호영님 prod 운영 시 첫 병목 해소 surface). **2순위 후속 surface:** Work Queue 일반 / RFQ-Quote detail / Dispatch Prep / Inventory Reorder. **Acceptance criteria (§11.142-impl 진입 시):** (1) brief 가 work object selected 시만 노출. (2) chatbot input 0 rendering. (3) main canvas usable (modal overlay X). (4) 모든 facts canonical-source backed. (5) AI narrative 가 status overwrite 0. (6) primary CTA 가 alive route 로 handoff. (7) page-per-feature 회귀 0. **Out of scope (별도 후속 트랙):** (a) `#operational-brief-impl-purchase-conversion` (§11.142-impl 본체). (b) `#operational-brief-rail-work-queue` — Work Queue 일반 surface 확장. (c) `#operational-brief-rail-rfq-detail` — RFQ-Quote detail 확장. (d) `#operational-brief-narrative-cache` — AI narrative 캐싱 (재생성 비용 회피). (e) `#operational-brief-mobile-bottom-sheet` — 모바일 변종 (rail → bottom sheet). **Lesson:** 외부 AI assistant 패턴 (Google Workspace AI / Gemini) 의 visual essence 채택 시 LabAxis 제품 제약 (chatbot 금지, canonical truth 보호, page-per-feature 금지) 강제 cross-check 가 first quality gate. AI 는 "답하는 주체" 가 아니라 "운영 상태를 압축해서 다음 행동으로 밀어주는 layer" — direction lock 자체가 향후 회귀 차단의 ADR-level 정형화. Phase B-α α-A/α-B 가 이미 closed 라 implementation 진입 의존성 작음 — α-C rewire 만 남음.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.141 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-purge-cron-soft-fail-alert` — §11.138 purge cron 의 실패 시 admin 가시성 강화. critical AuditLog (action=auto_purge_failed, success=false, errorMessage + failedSample) + console.error. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** auto_purge_failed audit / errors.length>0 분기 / success:false + errorMessage / failedSample slice(0,5) / §11.138 회귀 0. 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** `/api/cron/user-soft-delete-purge/route.ts` 의 candidates loop 후 `errors.length > 0` 시 (a) `console.error("[cron] FAIL ALERT")`, (b) `createAuditLog(USER_DELETED, action=auto_purge_failed, success:false, errorMessage:"purge cron 부분 실패", metadata:{cutoff/candidatesFound/purgedCount/failedCount/failedSample(최대 5건)/cronRunAt})`. 알림 audit log 자체 실패 시 graceful (try/catch 별도). **Verification:** vitest 19/19 PASS (purge-cron-fail-alert 5 + user-purge-cron 9 + dashboard-kpi-collapsible 5), §11.105 dark guard PASS. **운영자 가시성:** purge 실패 시 admin/audit 페이지에서 USER_DELETED + action=auto_purge_failed event 즉시 발견 가능. failedSample 5건만 보존 (audit log payload size limit). **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-purge-fail-email-notify` — admin email 자동 알림 (호영님 prod 운영 시 surface 발생 시점). (b) `#admin-purge-fail-slack-webhook` — Slack incoming webhook. (c) `#admin-purge-retry-queue` — 실패 user 자동 retry. **Lesson:** cron 실패 alert 의 minimum viable — audit log 가 이미 admin/audit 페이지에서 가시. email/Slack 통합은 외부 service 의존이라 prod scale-up 시점. failedSample 보존 (전체 errors 가 아닌 5건) 이 audit log payload size + 운영자 first-glance 정합.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.140 OPENED and CLOSED (audit-only):** `#contrast-audit` — WCAG 1.4.3 색 대비 4.5:1 (normal text) / 3:1 (large text + non-text) audit. **Phase 0 audit 결과:** (a) `text-slate-300` 326 sites — 대부분 muted icon (Package, count=0 시 dim) + empty state hint, 의도된 dim usage. (b) `text-slate-400` 다수 — muted text 정상 패턴 (§11.113 sweep 후 light theme 정합). (c) accent color 조합 (text-blue-700 on bg-blue-50 / text-rose-700 on bg-rose-50 / text-emerald-700 on bg-emerald-50) — 모두 4.5:1 이상 (Tailwind 700/800 톤). (d) 명백한 WCAG 1.4.3 위반 0건. **결론:** 정성적 audit 정합. 정밀 ratio 측정은 axe-core / lighthouse 외부 도구 필요 — 별도 트랙. **운영자 권장:** 호영님 prod 운영 시 chrome devtools "Issues" 탭 또는 axe DevTools extension 으로 page 별 verify. 발견 시점에 §11.140-followup 트랙 진입. **§11.113 정합 입증:** dark theme 잔재 (text-{color}-400 in light surface) sweep 이 contrast 위반 영구 차단의 first quality gate. text-700 + light bg-50 조합이 LabAxis 표준 — accent 색 모두 contrast safe. **Out of scope:** (a) `#contrast-audit-axe-integration` — axe-core CI 통합 (Vercel build 시 자동 audit). (b) `#contrast-audit-lighthouse-budget` — Lighthouse 점수 90+ budget. (c) `#contrast-large-text-3:1-verify` — 18pt+ 또는 14pt bold large text 의 3:1 ratio 별도 audit. **Lesson:** contrast audit 은 정성적 grep + 정량적 ratio 도구의 두 단계. §11.113 sweep 으로 정성적 정합 도달 — Tailwind 표준 톤 (text-700 + bg-50, text-900 + bg-white) 자동 4.5:1 보장. 외부 도구 트랙은 호영님 prod 운영 시 audit DevTools 사용 시점에 진입 (현재는 audit-only 결과 기록).
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.139 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#dashboard-kpi-mobile-collapsible` — KpiCard 의 §11.98 always-visible inline breakdown 을 collapsible accordion 으로 전환. 모바일 카드 높이 부담 해소. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** breakdownExpanded state / toggle button (한국어/Chevron) / conditional render / §11.98 desktop hover popup 회귀 0 / stopPropagation. 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) executive-summary-section.tsx 에 useState import + ChevronDown + cn 추가. (b) KpiCard 안에 `breakdownExpanded` state. (c) 기존 `<div className="md:hidden ...always-visible>` 을 `<button onClick stopPropagation> + conditional list` 로 전환. button 한국어 "내역 보기" / "내역 닫기" + ChevronDown rotate-180 transition + aria-expanded. **Verification:** vitest 5/5 PASS. **§11.98 → §11.139:** mobile breakdown UX 진화 — always-visible (§11.98) → collapsible (§11.139, default closed). 카드 높이 -40~50px 절약, 운영자 필요 시 토글. desktop hover popup 그대로 보존.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.138 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-soft-delete-purge-cron` — daily cron 으로 30일 경과 soft-deleted user 자동 hard purge. GDPR right-to-be-forgotten 정합 + audit 보존. **Phase 1 RED (9 tests):** cron endpoint 파일 / GET + auth / PURGE_AFTER_DAYS 30 / deletedAt query / USER_DELETED + auto_purge audit / db.user.delete / partial failure tolerance / vercel.json cron 등록 / §11.133 + §11.134 회귀 0. 9 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `apps/web/src/app/api/cron/user-soft-delete-purge/route.ts` 신규 (~110 lines) — `PURGE_AFTER_DAYS = 30`, GET handler with CRON_SECRET/x-vercel-cron-signature auth (§11.106 cron 패턴 reuse), `db.user.findMany({where:{deletedAt:{not:null,lt:cutoff}}})` query, 각 user 별로 `createAuditLog(USER_DELETED, action=auto_purge_30d)` 먼저 → `db.user.delete` (cascade), partial failure tolerance (errors[] 수집), 응답 `{cutoff, candidatesFound, purgedCount, failedCount, errors}`. (b) `vercel.json` crons 배열에 `{path: /api/cron/user-soft-delete-purge, schedule: "0 2 * * *"}` 추가 — 매일 새벽 02:00 UTC (한국 11:00 AM, 운영자 깨어 있는 시간). **Verification:** vitest 9/9 PASS. **§11.117 → §11.133 → §11.134 → §11.138 user lifecycle 완전 정형화 (GDPR 정합):** hard delete → soft delete → restore (30일 cooldown) → auto purge (cron). 잘못된 반려 → 30일 내 복구 가능, 복구 안 됐을 시 자동 hard purge + audit USER_DELETED action=auto_purge_30d 기록 (운영자 추적성 + GDPR right-to-be-forgotten). **운영 흐름:** admin 반려 → User.deletedAt set → "삭제된 사용자" dialog 에서 30일 내 복구 가능 → 30일 경과 시 daily cron 새벽 2시에 hard delete + cascade FK + audit metadata (purgedUserEmail/Name/Role/originalDeletedAt/purgedAt) 보존. **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-user-purge-cron-soft-fail-alert` — purge 실패 시 admin email 또는 sonner toast 알림 (호영님 prod 운영 시 surface 발생 시). (b) `#admin-user-purge-cron-grace-period-extend` — admin 이 특정 user 의 cooldown 연장 가능 (별도 schema). (c) `#admin-user-purge-cron-config-ui` — PURGE_AFTER_DAYS 를 admin UI 에서 변경. **Lesson:** GDPR right-to-be-forgotten 의 표준 패턴 — soft delete (즉시 user 사용 차단) + cooldown (실수 복구 가능) + auto purge (장기 보존 책임 회피). audit 는 purge 후에도 entityId + metadata 로 보존 (User row 자체는 사라지지만 누가/언제/왜 deleted 되었는지 추적). cron schedule 새벽 2시 (UTC) 가 한국 운영자 시간 11AM — 문제 발생 시 즉시 인지 가능. 본 cron 은 호영님 prod 운영 30일 후부터 active path — 첫 candidate 발생 시점에 검증.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.137 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-bulk-action-toast` — admin/users page 의 모든 mutation (single + bulk approve/reject/restore) 에 sonner toast 통합. console.warn 만이었던 부분 실패 가시성 향상. **Phase 1 RED (6 tests):** sonner import / bulkApprove 3분기 / bulkReject / single 3 mutation toast / onError handler / §11.135 회귀 0. 1 fail RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `import { toast } from "sonner"`. (b) bulkApproveMutation onSuccess 3분기 (failedCount===0 success / successCount===0 error / 그 외 warning 부분 성공) + onError toast.error. (c) bulkRejectMutation 동일. (d) approveMutation/rejectMutation/restoreMutation 에 toast.success + onError. **Verification:** vitest 6/6 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **운영자 가시성:** 일괄 처리 성공/부분/실패 즉시 sonner top-center toast (richColors + closeButton). 부분 실패 시 successCount + failedCount 동시. **Lesson:** sonner toast 가 a11y (role=status + aria-live 자동) 와 가시성 동시 향상. console.warn → toast 전환 비용 작음.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.136 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-row-checkbox` — §11.135 의 missing piece — row 별 checkbox UI (mobile card + desktop table) + select-all (header) + self-id 차단. **Phase 1 RED (7 tests):** toggleUserSelected helper / toggleSelectAll / currentUserId (useSession) / 3+ checkbox input / isSelf disabled / §11.135 회귀 0 / table colspan 8. 7 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) useSession import + currentUserId 추출 (`session?.user?.id`). (b) toggleUserSelected helper (Set add/delete) + toggleSelectAll (selectableIds 본인 제외 + 전체/해제 토글). (c) mobile card row 에 checkbox (h-4 w-4 accent-blue-600, isSelf disabled + title="본인은 선택할 수 없습니다"). (d) desktop table header 에 select-all checkbox + 모든 row 에 checkbox column. (e) empty state colSpan 8 갱신. **Verification:** vitest 15/15 PASS (row-checkbox 7 + bulk-actions 8), §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.135 + §11.136 bulk operation 완전 활성화:** checkbox click → selectedUserIds Set 채움 → bulk action bar 노출 → "일괄 승인" / "일괄 반려" 즉시 실행. self-id 차단으로 admin 본인 자기 자신 self-reject 회피 (client + server defense-in-depth). **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-user-bulk-action-shift-click` — Shift+Click 다중 선택 (UX 향상). (b) `#admin-user-bulk-action-toast` — sonner toast 통합 (현재 console.warn). (c) bulk approve 후 success 알림 sticky banner. **Lesson:** UI checkbox 의 self-id 차단은 client-side UX 향상 (disabled+tooltip) 이지만 보안은 endpoint self_reject 차단 (§11.117 + §11.135) 이 final guard. defense-in-depth 패턴 — UI 차단 + endpoint 차단 둘 다 적용. select-all 의 "본인 제외" 필터링이 운영자 자기 실수 회피.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.135 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-bulk-approve-reject` — admin/users 의 multi-row bulk approve / reject. §11.117 single-item 의 multi 확장. §11.102 admin-order-bulk-status 패턴. **Phase 1 RED (8 tests):** bulk-approve endpoint / POST + isAdmin + userIds / partial failure (successCount + failedItems) / bulk-reject endpoint / POST + isAdmin + self_reject 차단 / page bulk action bar (selectedUserIds + 일괄 승인/반려) / fixed bottom (모바일 §11.119 일관) / §11.117 single 회귀 0. 3 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `/api/admin/users/bulk-approve/route.ts` 신규 (~110 lines) — POST handler, body { userIds[] } iterate, sequential single-item POST `/api/admin/users/[id]/approval` (cookie + csrf forward), partial failure tolerance ({successCount, failedItems}), 50건 limit. (b) `/api/admin/users/bulk-reject/route.ts` 신규 (~115 lines) — 동일 패턴 with DELETE single-item 호출, self_reject 차단 (session.user.id 가 list 에 있으면 skip + failedItem 추가). (c) admin/users page.tsx 의 bulk action bar — selectedUserIds Set state + bulkApproveMutation + bulkRejectMutation + bar JSX (fixed bottom md:static, blue accent, 일괄 승인 / 일괄 반려 / 선택 해제 button + window.confirm 으로 반려 명시). onSuccess invalidate `["admin","users"]` + setSelectedUserIds(new Set()) 초기화. (d) 부분 실패 시 console.warn (toast 후속 별도). **Verification:** vitest 25/25 PASS (bulk-actions 8 + restore 9 + soft-delete 8), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS. **§11.117 → §11.133 → §11.134 → §11.135 admin lifecycle 완성:** single-item approve/reject (§11.117) + soft delete (§11.133) + restore (§11.134) + bulk (§11.135). 호영님 prod 운영 시 user 100+ 시점 multi-row 처리 가능. **Out of scope:** (a) row-level checkbox UI 부재 — 본 commit 은 bulk action bar + state 만, row 별 checkbox click handler 는 별도 트랙 `#admin-user-row-checkbox` (mobile card + desktop table 분기 추가 필요). (b) `#admin-user-bulk-restore` — 삭제된 사용자 dialog 의 multi-restore. (c) toast 통합 — 현재 console.warn, sonner toast 통합 별도. **Lesson:** bulk endpoint 패턴은 sequential single-item 호출 + transaction 분리가 정합 (§11.102 lesson 동일) — partial failure tolerance + 운영자 가시성 + endpoint logic 중복 0. self-reject 같은 cross-cutting validation 은 single + bulk 두 곳 동시 적용 (defense-in-depth). 50건 limit + window.confirm 운영자 명시 인지 패턴.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.134 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-soft-delete-restore` — §11.133 soft delete 의 inverse — deleted user 복구 surface. lifecycle 자연 마무리 (delete + restore). **Phase 1 RED (9 tests):** restore endpoint 파일 / POST + isAdmin / db.user.update + deletedAt:null / already_active 분기 / USER_UPDATED audit (action=user_restore) / getUsers onlyDeleted param / GET endpoint forward / page surface (button or dialog) / §11.133 회귀 0. 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `apps/web/src/app/api/admin/users/[id]/restore/route.ts` 신규 (~120 lines) — POST handler, auth/isAdmin/target check (404)/already_active 분기 (400)/db.user.update with deletedAt:null/AuditLog USER_UPDATED with action=user_restore + previousDeletedAt metadata. (b) `lib/api/admin.ts` getUsers helper 에 `onlyDeleted?: boolean` param 추가 — true 시 `where: { deletedAt: { not: null } }` (inverse), default false 는 §11.133 active filter. (c) `/api/admin/users` GET endpoint 에 `searchParams.get("onlyDeleted") === "true"` forward. (d) `apps/web/src/app/admin/users/page.tsx` header 에 "삭제된 사용자" button (Trash2 icon, outline) + DeletedUsersDialog component 신규 (~200 lines, page 끝). DeletedUsersDialog: useDialogA11y hook (§11.123 reuse), useQuery `?onlyDeleted=true`, restoreMutation onSuccess invalidate 두 query (deleted + active), 각 row: 이름/email + role badge + 반려 시각 + 복구 button (RotateCcw icon, emerald). loading/error/empty 3 state honest, role=dialog + aria-modal + aria-label. **Verification:** vitest 17/17 PASS (restore 9 + soft-delete 8), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS. **§11.117 → §11.133 → §11.134 lifecycle 완성:** hard delete (cascade) → soft delete (deletedAt) → restore (deletedAt:null). admin governance 의 안전 default 정합 — 잘못된 반려 즉시 회복 + audit 추적 강화 모두 보존. **운영 흐름:** 호영님 prod 운영 중 잘못 반려한 user 발견 시 → admin/users → "삭제된 사용자" → list 에서 복구 → 활성 list 자동 갱신 + audit 보존 (USER_UPDATED action=user_restore 기록). **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-user-soft-delete-purge-cron` — deletedAt 30일 후 hard purge cron (GDPR right-to-be-forgotten). (b) `#admin-user-deleted-pagination` — 100건 이상 시 page navigation. (c) `#admin-user-deleted-export-csv` — 삭제된 user CSV export (audit 외부 보존). **Lesson:** soft delete 의 lifecycle 마무리 (restore) 가 audit 추적 강화 + 잘못 반려 회복 동시 — operator 안심 운영 default. getUsers helper 의 onlyDeleted param 으로 same endpoint 재사용 (별도 endpoint 0). 같은 hook (useDialogA11y) + dialog 패턴 (history / deleted) reuse 로 코드 정형화. lifecycle complete 패턴: create (invite §11.116) + update (policy §11.115) + soft delete (§11.133) + restore (§11.134) + audit (§11.128 history) — admin governance complete.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.133 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-soft-delete` — §11.117 hard delete → soft delete schema 변경. audit 추적 강화 (User row 보존 + USER_DELETED audit + cascade FK 회피). **Phase 0 audit:** schema deletedAt 부재, §11.117 test 가 db.user.delete 매치 — test 갱신 필요. **Phase 1 RED (8 tests + §11.117 1 update):** schema deletedAt / DELETE endpoint update + deletedAt set / db.user.delete 호출 0 / getUsers deletedAt:null filter / auth.ts deletedAt 차단 / USER_DELETED audit 회귀 0 / self-reject 회귀 0 / migration SQL. 7 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `apps/web/prisma/schema.prisma` User 모델에 `deletedAt DateTime?` 추가 + 주석. (b) `apps/web/prisma/migrations/20260429120300_add_user_deleted_at/migration.sql` 신규 — `ALTER TABLE "User" ADD COLUMN "deletedAt" TIMESTAMP`. (c) `/api/admin/users/[id]` DELETE handler — `db.user.update({where:{id}, data:{deletedAt: new Date()}})` (hard delete 제거, audit 보존), docblock 갱신. (d) `lib/api/admin.ts` getUsers — `where: { deletedAt: null }` filter (soft-deleted user list 자동 제외). (e) `auth.ts` jwt callback — dbUser select 에 deletedAt 추가 + `dbUser?.deletedAt` truthy 시 token.id/role 미설정 + console.warn (OAuth deleted user 거부). 22/22 PASS (soft-delete 8 + approval 14). **Verification:** vitest 22/22 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.117 → §11.133 lifecycle:** hard delete (cascade) → soft delete (deletedAt + audit 보존). 호영님 prod migrate (`prisma migrate deploy`) 후 active path. **운영 흐름:** admin/users 의 "반려" → DELETE endpoint → User.deletedAt set → list 자동 사라짐 → audit 에 USER_DELETED 보존 → 추후 audit 조회 시 user metadata (email/name/role) 그대로 추적 가능. 받은 user 가 OAuth 시도 시 auth.ts callback 차단. **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-user-soft-delete-restore` — admin UI 에서 deleted user 복구 surface. (b) `#admin-user-soft-delete-purge-cron` — deletedAt 30일 후 hard purge cron (GDPR right-to-be-forgotten 정합). (c) `#admin-user-email-reuse-after-delete` — 같은 email 재 invite 시도 시 unique constraint conflict — soft-deleted user 의 email release 패턴 (별도 migration). **Lesson:** soft delete 패턴이 audit 트레이드오프 정형화 — User row 보존 + 동일 endpoint shape (response `{success, deletedId}` 변경 0) + caller 영향 0 (admin/users page 의 invalidate 그대로 동작). schema migration + endpoint 변경 + helper filter + auth callback 4 vector 동시 정합 필요. 호영님 prod migrate 후 active. soft delete 가 hard delete 보다 prod 운영 의 default 권장 — 추후 GDPR 등 규제 시 soft → hard purge cron 별도 트랙.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.132 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#aria-live-regions` — admin/users page 의 inline mutation error 표시 (formError / errorMsg) 에 `role="alert"` + `aria-live="assertive"` 추가. WCAG 4.1.3 (Status Messages) 정합. **Phase 0 audit:** sonner Toaster + shadcn Toaster 가 자동 aria-live 보유 (radix/sonner 내부 처리) — toast 채널은 OK. inline 표시 (formError 운영 정책 panel / errorMsg InviteUserDialog) 는 명시적 보강 필요. ops-hub block-state-ui 등 기존 일부 파일에서 role="status" / role="alert" 적용 사례 있으나 admin/users 의 두 inline error 부재. **Phase 1 RED (4 tests):** formError div role/aria-live / errorMsg div role/aria-live / §11.123 hook 회귀 0 / §11.129 dialog ARIA 회귀 0. 2 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** 두 inline error div 에 `role="alert"` + `aria-live="assertive"` 추가 (즉시 announce — error severity). 운영 정책 panel formError + InviteUserDialog errorMsg 둘 다. **Verification:** vitest 4/4 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119~§11.132 a11y full lifecycle 절대 마무리:** 4-layer (drawer + trap + skip + visible) + landmarks + watermark + reduce-motion + live-regions. WCAG 2.1 AA + 4.1.3 정합 영역 final touch. 호영님 prod 운영 시 키보드 only 사용자 / screen reader 사용자 / OS reduce-motion 설정 사용자 / 컴플라이언스 audit 외부 보존 모두 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#contrast-audit` — WCAG 1.4.3 색 대비 4.5:1 audit (별도 audit 도구). (b) `#animation-pause-button` — auto-play marquee pause/play. (c) `#admin-orders-mutation-toast-aria` — admin/orders 의 mutation success toast (sonner 자동 처리 가정 — Track B operator-driven discovery 시 진입). **Lesson:** aria-live 비용 작음 — 2-attribute 추가 만으로 screen reader 즉시 announce. assertive vs polite 차이 — error 는 assertive (즉시), success 는 polite (다른 announce 후). toast library (sonner / shadcn) 가 이미 자동 처리하니 inline 표시만 명시적 보강. WCAG 4.1.3 가 status message 의 핵심 — DOM 추가 없이 sr 이 인지 가능해야 함. role="alert" 가 implicit aria-live="assertive" + aria-atomic="true" 자동 — 단순 패턴 권장.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.131 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#reduce-motion-respect` — globals.css 의 `prefers-reduced-motion` media query 강화. WCAG 2.3.3 (Animation from Interactions) + 사용자 OS reduce-motion 설정 정합. 멀미·전정 장애·집중력 저하 사용자 보호. **Phase 0 audit:** globals.css 가 stagger 4 class 만 prefers-reduced-motion 처리 — drawer slide / hover transition / marquee / 기타 animation/transition 비반영. **Phase 1 RED (6 tests):** prefers-reduced-motion media query / universal selector / animation-duration short / transition-duration short / scroll-behavior:auto / §11.127 :focus-visible 회귀 0. 1 fail RED (scroll-behavior 부재). **Phase 2 GREEN:** 기존 stagger block 옆에 universal `*, *::before, *::after { animation-duration:0.01ms !important; animation-iteration-count:1 !important; transition-duration:0.01ms !important; scroll-behavior:auto !important; }` + `html { scroll-behavior:auto !important; }` 추가. WCAG 권장 표준 패턴 — 0 으로 만들지 않고 0.01ms 로 즉시 종료 (browser bug 회피). **Verification:** vitest 6/6 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **Reduce-motion 효과 (OS 설정 시):** drawer slide instant / hover transition skip / marquee 정지 / smooth scroll 즉시 점프. mouse hover / focus 시각 cue 자체는 유지 (visual cue 0 이 아님 — animation 만 단축). **§11.119~§11.131 a11y full lifecycle 마무리:** 4-layer (drawer + trap + skip + visible) + landmarks + watermark + reduce-motion. WCAG 2.1 AA 정합 영역 final touch. **Out of scope:** (a) `#contrast-audit` — WCAG 1.4.3 색 대비 4.5:1 audit (별도 audit 도구 필요). (b) `#aria-live-regions` — toast / loading 등 dynamic content. (c) `#animation-pause-button` — auto-play marquee 의 pause/play button. **Lesson:** prefers-reduced-motion 정합 비용 작음 — universal CSS 한 block 으로 모든 animation/transition cover. WCAG 2.3.3 가 명시적으로 권장하는 0.01ms 패턴 (0 은 일부 browser 가 animation listener trigger 부재로 broken state). hover/focus 시각 cue 는 transition 단축 후에도 보존 (instant change 만 감지 가능).
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.130 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#audit-pdf-watermark-image` — §11.109 server-side rendered audit PDF 에 회사 brand logo image embed + 디지털 서명 watermark 추가. 컴플라이언스 audit 외부 보존 시 회사 식별성 향상. **Phase 0 audit:** `apps/web/public/brand/Bio-Insight.png` 공식 brand asset 존재. 기존 §11.109 PDF 의 watermark 는 텍스트 only (서명란 + 안내 footer). **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** brand logo reference / img alt / digital watermark text / logo CSS sizing / 기존 §11.109 회귀 0 (report-header / log-table / signature-row). 3 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `header.report-header` CSS flex layout (logo + title-block 가로 정렬), `.logo` height:36px max-width:100px (인쇄 시 너무 크지 않도록). (b) `.digital-watermark` CSS — 9px font / #94a3b8 color / 0.05em letter-spacing. (c) HTML header 에 `<img src="/brand/Bio-Insight.png" alt="BioInsight Lab" class="logo" />` + title-block wrapper. (d) footer-block 다음 `<div class="digital-watermark"><strong>LabAxis Audit System</strong> · bioinsightlab.com · 인쇄본 출처 ${printedAt.toISOString()}</div>`. **Verification:** vitest 5/5 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **컴플라이언스 효과:** (1) 인쇄본 회사 식별성 향상 — 외부 audit 시 출처 즉시 인지. (2) ISO 검토 시 인쇄 시각 (ISO 8601) watermark 가 시점 confliction 회피. (3) 관행적 audit 양식 정합 (logo + 보존 안내 + 서명란 + 디지털 watermark). **Out of scope:** (a) `#audit-pdf-puppeteer-strict` — binary PDF 보존 (browser print 의존 회피). (b) `#audit-pdf-page-break-control` — 다중 page 인쇄 시 page break header repeat. (c) `#audit-pdf-csv-export` — CSV 데이터 export 별도 트랙. **Lesson:** 공식 brand asset (Bio-Insight.png) 활용이 inline SVG 또는 base64 embed 보다 minimal-diff — Next.js public/ 자동 host. server-rendered HTML 에서 absolute path `/brand/...` reference 만으로 prod 자동 작동. 인쇄 시 browser 가 image fetch — host alive 시 정상 작동. binary PDF (puppeteer) 트랙은 외부 audit 보존 use case 발생 시 별도 진입.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.129 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#aria-landmarks` — 4 nav element 에 aria-label 추가. WCAG 2.4.6 (Headings and Labels) + 1.3.1 (Info and Relationships) 정합. **Phase 0 audit:** semantic HTML 거의 정합 — `<header>`, `<main>`, `<aside>`, `<nav>` 등 implicit role 확보. 다중 `<nav>` element (DashboardSidebar 4 + AdminSidebar 1 + BottomNav 1 + DashboardHeader 1) 가 aria-label 부재 → 스크린 리더 listing 시 의미적 구분 어려움. **Phase 1 RED (4 tests):** AdminSidebar nav / BottomNav / DashboardSidebar / DashboardHeader breadcrumb. 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) AdminSidebar `<nav aria-label="관리자 메뉴">`. (b) BottomNav `<nav aria-label="모바일 하단 메뉴">`. (c) DashboardSidebar 메인 `<nav aria-label="대시보드 메뉴">`. (d) DashboardHeader breadcrumb `<nav aria-label="현재 위치">`. **Verification:** vitest 4/4 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119~§11.129 a11y full lifecycle 마무리:** 4-layer drawer + trap + skip + visible 정합 + landmarks aria-label 명시 → WCAG 2.1 AA 전체 surface 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#contrast-audit` — WCAG 1.4.3 색 대비 4.5:1 audit (별도 audit 도구). (b) `#reduce-motion-respect` — prefers-reduced-motion media query 정합. (c) `#aria-live-regions` — toast / loading 등 dynamic content aria-live. (d) DashboardSidebar 의 secondary nav 들 (3개 추가) 도 aria-label — 우선순위 작아 별도 트랙. **Lesson:** 다중 nav 가 한 페이지에 있으면 aria-label 로 구분이 standard. semantic HTML 자체는 implicit role 보유 → role="navigation" 명시 redundant. WCAG 정합 비용 작음 (1 line aria-label per nav). 본 4-file 변경으로 screen reader 의 navigation listing 구분 명확화.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.128 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-invite-history` — admin/users 에 invite 발급/사용 history dialog 추가. §11.116 USER_CREATED audit log 재사용 (별도 endpoint 0). **운영 가치:** 호영님이 누가 누구를 언제 초대했는지 timeline 확인, 가입 안 된 invited user 추적 (cleanup 후보), 같은 email 중복 invite 시도 audit. **Phase 0 audit:** `/api/audit-logs` endpoint 가 eventType filter 보유 — `?eventType=USER_CREATED` 호출 가능. §11.116 audit metadata 의 action="user_invite" + invitedEmail/invitedName/invitedRole/inviteLinkIssued 그대로 사용. 별도 endpoint 작성 0. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** 초대 내역 button (한국어) / audit-logs USER_CREATED filter / useDialogA11y hook / role=dialog / user_invite action filter. 3 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) admin/users page 의 header button row 에 "초대 내역" button 추가 (UserPlus 옆, History icon, outline variant). (b) `historyOpen` state + InviteHistoryDialog component 신규 (~150 lines, page 끝). (c) InviteHistoryDialog: useDialogA11y hook (§11.123 reuse), useQuery `/api/audit-logs?eventType=USER_CREATED&limit=50`, action="user_invite" client-side filter (메모이제이션), loading/error/empty 3 state honest, 각 row: 초대 받은 사람 이름/이메일 + role badge + 발급 actor + 발급 시각 (한국어 short format). role=dialog + aria-modal + aria-label "사용자 초대 내역". **Verification:** vitest 5/5 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS (audit-logs endpoint 매치). **§11.116 audit log 가치 입증:** invite endpoint 가 처음부터 audit log 에 metadata 풍부하게 기록 (invitedEmail/Name/Role/inviteLinkIssued) → 별도 schema 추가 0 + 별도 endpoint 0 + view-only client-side filter 만으로 history view 활성화. canonical truth 단일 source (AuditLog) + cross-surface 재사용 (audit page + admin/users history dialog). **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-user-invite-revoke` — 발급 후 invite 무효화 (현재는 user delete 로 effect 등치). (b) `#admin-user-invite-resend` — 같은 email 재발급 (UI 가 현재 409 reject 만, 재발급 confirm flow 별도). (c) `#admin-user-invite-pagination` — 50건 이상 시 page navigation. **Lesson:** audit log 가 metadata 풍부하면 향후 history view 트랙 의 비용 작음 — schema 추가 0 + endpoint 0 + UI dialog 만. §11.116 phase 0 시점에 invitedRole / inviteLinkIssued 등 metadata 미리 기록한 결정이 §11.128 enable. canonical truth 의 single source 패턴 활용 — 새 view 마다 endpoint 추가 회귀 차단.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.127 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#focus-visible-style` — globals.css 에 `:focus-visible` outline 정형화. 키보드 사용자 visual cue (WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible). mouse 사용자에게는 browser default 로 :focus-visible 자동 무시. **Phase 0 audit:** globals.css 378 lines, `:focus-visible` 0건. 두 개의 `@layer base` block (line 107, 197) 보유. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** :focus-visible selector / outline 2px solid / outline-offset / blue accent / @layer base. 3 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** globals.css line 215 (@layer base 의 두 번째 block 안 — body font-family 다음) 에 `:focus-visible` 추가. `outline: 2px solid #2563eb` (LabAxis 표준 blue-600), `outline-offset: 2px` (focus ring breathing room), `border-radius: 0.375rem` (rounded sm). specificity 1 — shadcn/ui 의 `.button:focus-visible:ring-*` (specificity 2) 가 우선 적용 → 개별 컴포넌트 스타일 보존. **Verification:** vitest 5/5 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119~§11.127 mobile + a11y full lifecycle 완성:** sidebar drawer + dialog focus trap + skip-link + :focus-visible visual cue 4-layer WCAG 2.1 AA + 2.4.7 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#aria-landmarks` — banner / navigation / contentinfo landmarks 명시. (b) `#contrast-audit` — WCAG 1.4.3 색 대비 4.5:1 audit. (c) `#reduce-motion-respect` — prefers-reduced-motion media query 정합. **Lesson:** `:focus-visible` 가 `:focus` 보다 정합 — mouse click 시 outline 노출 회피 (UX 향상) + 키보드 Tab 시만 outline. specificity 1 universal selector 가 shadcn 등 컴포넌트 스타일 override 안 함. Tailwind cascade 정합. 한 줄 CSS 추가로 모든 button/link/input 키보드 cue 자동 활성화 — 가장 비용 작은 a11y 트랙. 4-layer 패턴 (drawer + trap + skip + visible) 이 키보드 only 사용자의 navigation experience 정합.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.126 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-skip-link` — admin domain 7 page 에 skip-link 자동 적용. **Phase 0 audit:** 7 admin page (admin/, orders, users, quotes, organizations, activity, settings) 모두 main element 0건 + admin/layout.tsx 부재. 각 page 가 직접 AdminSidebar mount. **Scope decision:** admin/layout.tsx 신규 with skip-link + main wrapper. children prop 만 wrap → 기존 page 의 sidebar mount 패턴 보존 (sidebar 중복 0). main landmark 안에 page 의 sidebar+content 구조 그대로 들어감 — WCAG 정합 (main landmark 1개). **Phase 1 RED (7 tests):** 파일 존재 / default export / href=#admin-main / id=admin-main + tabIndex=-1 / sr-only + focus:not-sr-only / 한국어 / children render. 첫 7 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** `apps/web/src/app/admin/layout.tsx` 신규 (~30 lines) — skip-link `<a href="#admin-main">본문 바로가기</a>` + `<main id="admin-main" tabIndex={-1} className="outline-none">{children}</main>`. **Verification:** vitest 12/12 PASS (admin-skip-link 7 + dashboard-skip-link 5), §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119~§11.126 mobile + a11y full lifecycle 마무리:** admin + general user dashboard 양쪽 모두 sidebar drawer + dialog focus trap + skip-link 3-layer WCAG 2.1 AA 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#focus-visible-style` — :focus-visible outline 정형화 (design system 차원). (b) `#aria-landmarks` — banner / navigation / contentinfo 명시 (별도 audit). (c) `#admin-page-main-element-cleanup` — 향후 page 별 main 직접 사용 시 nested 회피. **Lesson:** Next.js layout convention 활용이 7 page 일괄 처리 minimal-diff 정합 — 1 file new, page 변경 0. children-only wrap 패턴이 기존 page 구조 (sidebar mount) 보존 + skip-link 강제 추가 동시 가능.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.125 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#dashboard-skip-link` — DashboardShell 에 skip-link anchor + main id 추가. WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.1 Bypass Blocks 정합. **Phase 0 truth lock:** §11.125 첫 audit 에서 `#admin-orders-status-dialog-keyboard-nav` 가치 0 발견 — admin/orders 가 shadcn `<Dialog>` (radix-ui based) 사용, focus trap / Esc / role / aria-modal 자동 처리. → `#dashboard-skip-link` 로 pivot. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** main id="main-content" / skip-link href / sr-only + focus:not-sr-only / 한국어 텍스트 / DashboardSidebar 회귀 0. 첫 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `<a href="#main-content">` skip-link anchor 추가 (DashboardShell 최상단) — `sr-only focus:not-sr-only focus:fixed focus:top-3 focus:left-3 focus:z-[100] focus:bg-blue-600 focus:text-white focus:px-3 focus:py-2 focus:rounded-md focus:text-sm focus:font-semibold focus:shadow-lg`. 한국어 "본문 바로가기" + Tab 첫 stop 시점에 가시화 + 클릭/Enter 시 main 으로 jump. (b) `<main>` 에 `id="main-content" tabIndex={-1}` 추가 — anchor target + 스크린 리더 focus 가능. **Verification:** vitest 5/5 PASS, §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119~§11.125 admin + general user mobile + a11y 완성:** sidebar drawer + dialog focus trap + skip-link 3-layer WCAG 2.1 AA 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-skip-link` — admin pages 도 동일 패턴 (admin layout.tsx 부재 — 각 page 별 main 추가 또는 layout 신규, 별도 트랙). (b) `#focus-visible-style` — :focus-visible outline 정형화 (design system 차원). (c) `#aria-landmarks` — banner/navigation/contentinfo 등 landmark roles 명시 (별도 audit). **Lesson:** skip-link 는 가장 작은 a11y 트랙이지만 키보드 사용자 정합성 큼 — Tab 첫 stop 으로 nav 건너뛰는 표준 패턴. sr-only + focus:not-sr-only + tabIndex=-1 on target 의 단순 조합으로 WCAG 2.4.1 정합. shadcn/radix-ui 의존 dialog 가 a11y baseline 자동 보장 — useDialogA11y hook (§11.123) 은 inline JSX dialog 한정. truth lock 이 §11.125 의 first quality gate — admin/orders shadcn Dialog 가 a11y 정합 자동 입증.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.124 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#dashboard-sidebar-keyboard-nav` — DashboardSidebar (general user, 419 lines) 에 §11.123 useDialogA11y hook reuse. **Phase 0 audit:** DashboardSidebar 가 §11.122 truth-lock 시 mobile drawer 패턴 보유 확인했으나 a11y 강화 (Esc / focus trap / role=dialog / aria-modal) 0건. **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** useDialogA11y hook 사용 / role=dialog + aria-modal / aria-label / focusable querySelectorAll / 기존 mobile drawer 회귀 0 (pathname auto-close 유지). 4 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) useDialogA11y import. (b) component top 에 hook 호출 — `mobileDialog = useDialogA11y<HTMLElement>({ open: isMobileOpen, onClose: () => setIsMobileOpen(false) })`. (c) mobile aside 에 `ref={mobileDialog.dialogRef}` + `role="dialog"` + `aria-modal={isMobileOpen ? "true" : undefined}` + `aria-label="대시보드 메뉴"`. **Verification:** vitest 19/19 PASS (admin domain a11y + dashboard-sidebar a11y), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS. **§11.123 hook reuse 효과 입증:** AdminSidebar (§11.122 inline 패턴) → useDialogA11y hook (§11.123) → DashboardSidebar (§11.124 hook reuse) 흐름. 본 트랙 코드 변경 11 lines (1 import + 1 hook 호출 + 4 ARIA attribute) 만으로 키보드/스크린 리더 a11y 정형화. **§11.119~§11.124 admin + general user mobile + a11y 완성:** 모든 sidebar (Admin + Dashboard) + dialog (3 admin) 에 WCAG 2.1 AA 정합 적용. **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-orders-status-dialog-keyboard-nav` — admin/orders 의 상태 전환 dialog (별도 트랙). (b) `#dashboard-sidebar-skip-link` — "Skip to main content" anchor. (c) `#focus-visible-style` — :focus-visible outline 스타일 정형화. **Lesson:** hook 패턴 추출 (§11.123) 후 다른 컴포넌트 reuse (§11.124) 의 incremental 적용 비용이 매우 작음 — 동일 패턴 회귀 차단 + a11y 표준 자동 확산. 향후 새 dialog/drawer 추가 시 hook 그대로 import → 보일러플레이트 0. WCAG 정합 surface 확장 비용이 hook 추출 + initial 적용 (§11.122/§11.123) 후 거의 0 으로 수렴.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.123 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-modal-keyboard-nav` — admin/users 의 3 dialog (InviteUserDialog / ConfirmReject / 운영 정책 panel) 에 §11.122 a11y 패턴 reusable hook 으로 적용. **Phase 1 RED (8 tests):** hook 파일 존재 / Esc / Tab focus trap / return-focus / page useDialogA11y 사용 / role=dialog + aria-modal / setConfirmReject(null) / setSelectedUserId(null). 3 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `apps/web/src/lib/hooks/use-dialog-a11y.ts` 신규 (~115 lines) — `useDialogA11y<TElement>({ open, onClose, disableEscapeClose? })` reusable hook. dialogRef + autoFocusRef + previousActiveElementRef. open 시 이전 active element 기억 + close 시 복귀 (try/catch graceful), open 시 50ms timeout 후 autoFocusRef 또는 dialog 안 첫 focusable element focus, keydown listener (Esc → onClose, Tab → focus trap first/last 순환). (b) admin/users page.tsx — useDialogA11y import + 3 hook 호출 (policyDialog / rejectDialog / inline InviteUserDialog 의 dialog). 각 dialog root 에 dialogRef + role=dialog + aria-modal=true + aria-label. **Verification:** vitest 32/32 PASS (admin domain mobile + a11y + approval), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS. **Hook 추출 효과:** admin/users 의 3 dialog 에서 동일 a11y 패턴 자동 적용. 향후 `#dashboard-sidebar-keyboard-nav` 또는 다른 dialog (admin/orders DELIVERED dialog 등) 에도 hook 그대로 사용 가능 — DRY + 회귀 차단 자동화. **§11.119~§11.123 admin domain mobile + a11y 완성:** main content + sidebar (drawer + 키보드) + dialogs (focus trap + ARIA). WCAG 2.1 AA dialog focus management 패턴 정합. **Out of scope:** (a) `#dashboard-sidebar-keyboard-nav` — DashboardSidebar 동일 패턴 (다른 component, 별도 트랙). (b) `#admin-orders-dialog-keyboard-nav` — admin/orders 의 status 전환 dialog (별도 트랙). (c) `#focus-visible-style` — :focus-visible 명시적 outline 스타일 (전체 design system 정형화). **Lesson:** dialog a11y 패턴은 inline 작성보다 hook 추출이 정합 — 3 dialog 일관 적용 + 향후 추가 dialog 시 hook 그대로 reuse. previousActiveElement 패턴이 close 후 자연스러운 focus 흐름 (이전 trigger 로 복귀, mouse 운영자도 이상 인지 0). disableEscapeClose option 도 미래 destructive operation dialog (예: 이중 확인 필요) 에 대비.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.122 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-sidebar-keyboard-nav` — §11.121 mobile drawer 의 accessibility 강화. **Phase 0 truth lock:** 본 트랙 진입 전 `#dashboard-mobile-drawer` 가치 0 발견 — DashboardSidebar (apps/web/src/app/_components/dashboard-sidebar.tsx, 419 lines) 가 §11.121 보다 더 sophisticated mobile drawer 이미 보유 (isMobileOpen/onMobileOpenChange dual-control, pathname auto-close, click-outside auto-close, mobile-sidebar/mobile-menu-button class). dashboard-shell.tsx 도 fully wired, dashboard/layout.tsx 가 모든 dashboard page 자동 적용. → §11.122 트랙을 keyboard-nav 로 pivot. **Phase 1 RED (6 tests):** Esc key, aria-modal/role=dialog, aria-label, useRef/focus, return-focus to trigger, z-index layering. 4 fails RED (aria-label / z-index 은 §11.121 에서 이미 보유). **Phase 2 GREEN:** AdminSidebar (~155 lines + ~50 lines 추가) — (a) `useRef<HTMLButtonElement>` triggerRef + `useRef<HTMLElement>` drawerRef + closeButtonRef. (b) useEffect on mobileOpen — keydown listener: `Escape` → setMobileOpen(false), `Tab` → focus trap (querySelectorAll focusable, first/last 순환, shift+Tab 시 last 로). (c) useEffect open transition — drawer open 시 50ms timeout 후 closeButton focus, open→close 전이 시 trigger focus 복귀 (wasOpenRef 로 상태 추적). (d) hamburger button 에 aria-expanded + aria-controls="admin-sidebar-drawer". (e) drawer aside 에 id + role="dialog" + aria-modal (open 시만) + aria-label. **Verification:** vitest 12/12 PASS (admin-sidebar-keyboard-nav 6 + admin-sidebar-mobile 6, §11.121 회귀 0), §11.105 dark guard PASS. **Accessibility 강화 효과:** (1) 키보드 only 운영자 — Tab 으로 drawer 내부 순환, Esc 로 close. (2) screen reader — role=dialog + aria-modal=true 로 modal 인지, aria-label "관리자 메뉴" 읽음. (3) focus 복귀 — close 후 hamburger button 으로 자연스러운 흐름. (4) WCAG 2.1 AA dialog focus management 패턴 정합. **§11.119 + §11.120 + §11.121 + §11.122 admin domain mobile + a11y 완성:** main content (table → card) + sidebar (drawer + 키보드 + ARIA) + bulk action (fixed bottom). **Out of scope:** (a) `#dashboard-sidebar-keyboard-nav` — DashboardSidebar 동일 패턴 적용 (다른 component, 별도 트랙). (b) `#admin-modal-keyboard-nav` — InviteUserDialog / ConfirmReject dialog 의 focus trap (§11.116/§11.117 dialog). (c) `#admin-sidebar-skip-link` — "Skip to main content" anchor (전체 layout 정형화 시점). **Lesson:** truth lock 이 phase 0 의 first quality gate — 가치 0 트랙 (`#dashboard-mobile-drawer`) 을 작업 시작 전 audit 으로 발견 + 더 가치 있는 트랙 (`#admin-sidebar-keyboard-nav`) 으로 pivot 정합. accessibility 강화는 운영자 본인 즉시 가치 작아 보여도 (호영님 본인은 mouse 운영) screen reader 운영자 / 키보드 power user / 미래 audit 컴플라이언스 시점에 가치 ↑. WCAG 2.1 AA pattern (focus trap + Esc close + return-focus) 가 mobile drawer 의 standard 정형화.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.121 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-sidebar-mobile-drawer` — AdminSidebar 자체에 mobile drawer 패턴 추가. 7 admin page (admin/, orders, users, quotes, organizations, activity, settings) 모두에 자동 적용. §11.119 + §11.120 의 final piece — main 영역 mobile responsive 가 sidebar 의 viewport 점유로 squeeze 되던 issue 해소. **Phase 0 audit:** AdminSidebar 79 lines, `<aside w-56 bg-slate-900>` always-visible inline, 7 page 동시 사용. 컴포넌트 자체만 수정 → 7 page 수정 0. **Phase 1 RED (6 tests):** source-level lint guard — desktop 분기 (md:flex/translate), useState (drawer state), Menu/Hamburger icon, backdrop overlay, pathname 자동 close (useEffect 또는 setOpen(false) on Link), z-index layering. 6/6 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** AdminSidebar rewrite (~155 lines) — (a) state `mobileOpen` + useState. (b) hamburger trigger fixed top-3 left-3 z-30 (md:hidden) — sidebar 노출 button. (c) backdrop overlay fixed inset-0 z-40 (mobile open 시) — click → close. (d) sidebar 자체 layering: desktop `md:relative md:translate-x-0` + mobile `fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-50 -translate-x-full` (close 시) / `translate-x-0` (open 시) — slide-in transform transition. (e) header 안에 mobile-only X close button. (f) useEffect on pathname → setMobileOpen(false) (메뉴 클릭 후 자동 close). (g) useEffect for body scroll lock when drawer open. **Verification:** vitest 15/15 PASS (admin mobile + admin-sidebar-mobile), §11.105 dark guard PASS. **§11.119 + §11.120 + §11.121 admin domain mobile parity 완성:** main content (table → card) + sidebar (drawer) 둘 다 모바일 정형화. 호영님 외근 중 admin/orders 진입 → top-left hamburger → drawer 슬라이드 → users/orders 등 메뉴 이동 → drawer 자동 close → 콘텐츠 즉시 노출. **Out of scope:** (a) `#dashboard-mobile-drawer` — 일반 user dashboard 의 sidebar 모바일 (별도 트랙, 다른 component DashboardSidebar). (b) `#admin-sidebar-keyboard-nav` — drawer keyboard accessibility (focus trap, Esc close). (c) `#admin-sidebar-swipe-gesture` — touch swipe to open/close. **Lesson:** sidebar 컴포넌트 자체에 mobile drawer 추가가 7 page 동시 적용보다 minimal-diff 정합 (1 file edit vs 7 file). transform translate + transition 가 max-width animation 보다 부드럽고 layout shift 0. body scroll lock + pathname auto-close 두 UX detail 이 모바일 운영 친화 — 메뉴 클릭 후 즉시 콘텐츠 보이고 backdrop scroll 방해 0.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.120 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-users-mobile-card-list` — admin/users 모바일 반응형. §11.119 admin/orders 와 동일 dual-render 패턴 적용. **Phase 1 RED (4 tests):** source-level lint guard — desktop-only table (`hidden md:block`) / mobile-only card list (`md:hidden`) / mobile button onClick wired (setSelectedUserId / approveMutation / rejectMutation / setConfirmReject) / 같은 데이터 source (filteredUsers). 첫 run 2 fails RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) 기존 table wrapper 에 `hidden md:block` 추가 (desktop only). (b) table 위에 mobile card list 신규 (~135 lines, `md:hidden space-y-2`) — loading/error/empty state honest 분기 + 각 card: 이름+이메일+상태 badge / role+조직+lastActivity / 정책 button (선택 시 강조) + pending row 의 반려/승인 button (loading icon + dual disabled). 4/4 PASS. **Verification:** vitest 23/23 PASS (admin mobile + approval), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS. **§11.119 + §11.120 mobile parity 도달:** admin/orders + admin/users 둘 다 mobile responsive. AdminSidebar 자체 mobile drawer 별도 트랙 (admin domain 전체 영향) — 본 commit 으로 main content 영역 모바일 운영 가능. **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-users-mobile-pagination` — pagination footer 가 desktop wrapper 안에 있어 모바일 미노출. 호영님 user 100+ 시점에 surface 발생 시 진입. (b) `#admin-sidebar-mobile-drawer` — AdminSidebar 자체 (다른 admin page 동시 영향). (c) `#admin-users-policy-panel-mobile` — 운영 정책 panel 의 모바일 full-screen modal. **Lesson:** §11.119 의 dual-render 패턴이 admin domain 의 다른 surface 에도 mechanical 하게 적용 가능 — 매 트랙마다 동일 RED test (5 source-level lint) → desktop wrapper 에 hidden md:block + mobile card list 추가. minimal-diff + 회귀 차단 자동화. user-friendly mobile UX (loading/error/empty 3 state 모두 honest, button group flex-wrap, primary action 강조) 도 두 페이지 일관 적용.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.119 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#order-operator-surface-mobile` — admin/orders 모바일 반응형. §11.80 + §11.102 (bulk-status) 로 정형화된 surface 가 desktop only 였던 것 정정. 호영님 외근/외부 미팅 중 mobile transaction 가능. **Phase 0 audit:** admin/orders/page.tsx 672 lines, md/sm/lg 분기 0건, table 1개 + overflow-x scroll 미적용 → 모바일 가로 깨짐. AdminSidebar 자체 모바일 drawer 는 별도 트랙 (admin domain 영향 큼). **Phase 1 RED (5 tests):** source-level lint regression guard — desktop-only table 분기 (`hidden md:block`), mobile-only card list (`md:hidden`), bulk action bar mobile fixed (`fixed bottom-0`), filter flex-wrap, checkbox onClick wired. 첫 run 3 fails → real RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) bulk action bar 의 className 에 `fixed bottom-0 inset-x-0 z-40 md:static md:rounded-xl shadow-lg md:shadow-sm` 추가 — 모바일 fixed (선택 후 즉시 액션) / 데스크탑 inline. (b) table wrapper 에 `hidden md:block` 추가 — desktop only. (c) table 위에 mobile card list 신규 (~95 lines) — `md:hidden space-y-2` + 각 card: checkbox + 주문번호+상태 badge 가로 / 운영자/조직 / 품목 (외 N건) / ₩총액+상태전환 button (canTransition 분기) / 생성일. select-all toggle button (모바일 footer). 5/5 PASS. **Verification:** vitest 80/80 PASS (admin domain 5 files), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.45 inline-hex guard PASS. **LabAxis 원칙 준수:** mock 0 (real Order data forward), no fake (canTransition 분기 + 최종 상태 표시), dead button 0 (모든 button onClick wired), same-canvas (table+card 동시 보존, layout shift 0), responsive 정합 (375px viewport 가정). **Out of scope:** (a) `#admin-sidebar-mobile-drawer` — AdminSidebar 자체 모바일 drawer (다른 admin page 영향). (b) `#admin-users-mobile-card-list` — admin/users 동일 패턴 (별도 트랙). (c) `#admin-order-bulk-delivery-mobile` — DELIVERED bulk dialog 의 lot/location form 모바일. **Lesson:** mobile responsive 트랙은 (a) 기존 desktop layout 보존 + (b) 모바일 분기 추가 dual-render 패턴이 minimal-diff 정합 — `hidden md:block` (desktop) + `md:hidden` (mobile) 둘 다 보존. layout shift 0 + content shape 차이 (table vs card) 두 form factor 모두 정합. bulk action bar 의 fixed bottom 모바일 + static 데스크탑 dual mode 도 동일 패턴 — 선택 후 즉시 액션 가능 운영 가치 큼. source-level regression guard 가 향후 desktop-only 회귀 차단 (다른 dev 가 mobile 분기 무심코 제거 시 build 실패).
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.118 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-users-route-encoding-fix` + `#admin-users-pagination-ui` (합본 minor cleanup) — admin/users 영역 마무리. §11.114 deferred 두 트랙 처리. **(a) encoding fix:** `apps/web/src/app/api/admin/users/route.ts` 의 한국어 주석이 mojibake (`사용자 목록 조회` → `ì¬ì©ì ëª©ë¡ ì¡°í`, UTF-8 → Latin-1 → UTF-8 decode 누락) 였음 — 다른 dev 의 UTF-8 비호환 editor 또는 git autocrlf=true 환경에서 commit 한 흔적. 파일 전체 rewrite (UTF-8 명시) 로 mojibake 0건. 미사용 import (`updateUserRole` — role 변경은 §11.115/§11.117 에서 별도 endpoint 처리) 제거. 에러 메시지 한국어 통일 ("Failed to fetch users" → "사용자 목록 조회에 실패했습니다."). **(b) pagination UI:** §11.114 의 `limit=200` hardcoded → `PAGE_SIZE=50` + page state + URLSearchParams `page` 추가. table 하단에 pagination footer (총 N명 / 시작-끝 표시 / 이전·다음 button + 현재/총 페이지 indicator). search/role 변경 시 page 1 reset (useEffect). totalPages > 1 일 때만 footer 노출 (조건부). 50건 미만 list 면 footer 0 — minimal UI noise. **Verification:** vitest 75/75 PASS (admin 75 — quotes 3 + users-approval 14 + users-approval-policy 28 + users-invite 30), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS, mojibake grep 0건. **LabAxis 원칙 준수:** mock 0, no fake (실제 page param backend forward + total/totalPages 사용), dead button 0 (이전/다음 boundary disabled), canonical truth (backend page+total source). **Out of scope:** (a) page size 변경 UI (운영자 25/50/100 선택 — 기본 50 충분), (b) jump-to-page input (totalPages > 10 prod 발생 시 surface). **Lesson:** mojibake encoding bug 는 silent — runtime 영향 0 이라 audit 시점에만 발견. CI grep guard (`#admin-route-encoding-guard` deferred 트랙 후보) 가 회귀 차단 가능 — 단, false positive 위험 있어서 (의도된 latin-1 special chars) 신중 도입. 본 commit 으로 admin/users 4 file (page + GET route + 3 sub endpoint) 모두 UTF-8 정합. pagination UI 도 §11.114 의 hardcoded limit=200 잔재 정리 — 호영님 prod 운영 시 user 수 100+ 시점에 자동 분할 표시 활성화. 둘 다 작은 트랙이지만 admin domain lifecycle final cleanup 으로서 가치.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.117 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-approval-flow` — admin manual approve / reject 활성화. §11.114 admin/users 의 row "승인" / "반려" disabled placeholder 정정. §11.116 OAuth 자동 활성화가 default path 지만, manual approve (외부 SSO 미보유 user OAuth bypass) + reject (cleanup) 두 use case 처리. **Phase 0 audit:** AuditEventType.USER_DELETED 존재, /api/admin/users/[id]/route.ts 부재 (approval-policy sub만 있음 — 신규 작성 가능), User FK 모두 onDelete:Cascade — pending user delete 안전. **Phase 1 RED (14 tests):** approval endpoint source contract 7 (POST export, isAdmin, emailVerified=new Date, USER_UPDATED audit, already-active 분기, auth session) + reject endpoint source contract 7 (DELETE export, isAdmin, self-reject 차단, db.user.delete, USER_DELETED audit, auth session). 첫 run "endpoint 파일 없음" → real RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `api/admin/users/[id]/approval/route.ts` 신규 (~120 lines) — POST handler, auth/isAdmin/target check (404)/이미 활성 분기 (400 already_active)/db.user.update with emailVerified=new Date()/AuditLog USER_UPDATED with action=manual_approval. (b) `api/admin/users/[id]/route.ts` 신규 (~115 lines) — DELETE handler, auth/isAdmin/self-reject 차단 (session.user.id === targetUserId 시 400 self_reject)/target check (404)/db.user.delete (cascade)/AuditLog USER_DELETED with metadata (deletedUser email/name/role/wasActive/reason). 14/14 PASS. **Phase 3 wiring:** `apps/web/src/app/admin/users/page.tsx` 의 row "승인" / "반려" button onClick 와이어링 (이전 disabled placeholder 정정) — useMutation 2개 (approveMutation/rejectMutation) + isPending dual disabled (한 mutation 중에 다른 button block) + variables match 로 row-level loading icon. "반려" 는 즉시 실행 대신 confirm dialog modal (영구 삭제 강조 + 한국어 안내 + cancel/영구 삭제 button). onSuccess invalidate `["admin","users"]` + selected panel 닫기 (반려된 user 가 selected 상태 시). **Verification:** vitest 72/72 PASS (§11.115 28 + §11.116 30 + §11.117 14), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS (`/api/admin/users/${id}/approval` + `/api/admin/users/${id}` URL 매치). **§11.114-§11.117 admin governance lifecycle 완성:** (1) §11.114 admin/users mock 제거 + real fetcher (2) §11.115 운영 정책 read+write surface (3) §11.116 invite link + OAuth 자동 활성화 (4) §11.117 manual approve / reject. 호영님 prod 운영 시 신규 user lifecycle (invite → OAuth 자동 활성화 또는 manual approve → 운영 정책 설정 → 활성 운영) end-to-end 가능. **LabAxis 원칙 준수:** mock 0, no fake success (confirm dialog 명시 영구 삭제 안내), dead button 0, canonical truth (User 모델 직접), self-protection (admin 자기 반려 차단), governance 분리 (admin only). **Out of scope (별도 트랙):** (a) `#admin-user-soft-delete` — soft delete (deleted_at 컬럼 추가) 로 audit 보존 강화 (현재는 hard delete + audit log 만). (b) `#admin-user-reject-reason` — 반려 사유 입력 form. (c) `#admin-user-bulk-approve-reject` — multi-row 일괄 처리. **Lesson:** "OAuth 자동 활성화가 default path" 인 환경에서 manual approve/reject 의 가치는 작아 보이지만 governance scenario (외부 SSO 미보유 user 의 admin bypass approve, 잘못 invite 한 user cleanup) 가 prod 운영 시 자주 surface 됨. minimal-diff feature (endpoint 2개 + button onClick 와이어링 + confirm dialog) 가 admin lifecycle complete 도달의 final piece. self-reject 차단도 중요 — UI 상 admin 본인 row 의 button 비노출하지만 endpoint 차원 guard 가 defense-in-depth.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.116 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-invite-flow` (link-only, 옵션 A) — admin 이 신규 user 를 미리 생성 + invite link 복사 → 외부 채널 (Slack/카톡) 직접 전달 → 받은 user 가 link → Google OAuth → email match 로 자동 활성화. 호영님 prod 운영 시 첫 신규 user 받을 때 즉시 필요. **Phase 0 audit 결과:** (a) `lib/email/sender.ts` fake (production 도 console.log only TODO) — sendEmail 호출만 하면 fake-success 회귀 위험. (b) NextAuth EmailProvider 비활성, OAuth (Google) 만 활성. (c) AuditEventType.USER_CREATED 존재. (d) **중요 발견:** auth.ts jwt callback 의 `db.user.findUnique({where:{email}})` 후 dbUser 있으면 token link 만 — emailVerified 자동 update 미포함. invited user 가 OAuth 후에도 status="pending" 영구 → fake success 회귀. → §11.116 scope 에 auth.ts 1-line patch 포함. **옵션 A 채택 이유 (vs 옵션 B email send):** dependency 0 (외부 service 미필요), fake email 0, 호영님 prod 즉시 사용 가능. 단점은 admin 의 manual 링크 전달 step 1회 — 운영 초기 user 수 적은 단계 acceptable. **Phase 1 RED:** `__tests__/api/admin/users-invite.test.ts` (~230 lines, 30 tests) — validateInviteInput unit (email valid/trim/lowercase/required/format/empty/no-domain + name optional/trim + role 6 valid + missing/invalid throws), buildInviteLink (encoded format, trailing slash, special chars), endpoint source contract (POST export, isAdmin guard, validateInviteInput 사용, db.user.create, USER_CREATED audit, buildInviteLink, auth() session), auth.ts emailVerified link patch contract. 첫 run "Failed to resolve" → real RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `lib/admin/invite.ts` 신규 (~100 lines) — pure function `validateInviteInput` (email lowercase normalize, name trim, role enum check via Set) + `buildInviteLink` (URL encode + trailing slash 정규화) + `InviteValidationError` class. (b) `api/admin/users/invite/route.ts` 신규 (~165 lines) — POST handler, auth/isAdmin/validation/duplicate-check (409, existing.emailVerified 분기 정보 노출), User.create (organization=actor's), AuditLog (USER_CREATED + invite_email/name/role metadata), buildInviteLink with NEXTAUTH_URL → request.origin → request.nextUrl fallback. (c) `auth.ts` jwt callback patch — dbUser select 에 emailVerified/name/image 추가 + dbUser 있고 emailVerified null 시 db.user.update with emailVerified=new Date() + name/image OAuth profile fallback. 30/30 PASS. **Phase 3 wiring:** `apps/web/src/app/admin/users/page.tsx` "사용자 초대" button enable (이전 §11.114 disabled placeholder 정정) + `InviteUserDialog` 컴포넌트 신규 (~225 lines, page 끝). dialog: 입력 form (email + name + role 6 options) → "초대 링크 생성" mutation → success state with invite link + Copy button (Clipboard API + 복사 시각 피드백 2초) + 추가 초대 / 닫기. onCreated → invalidate `["admin","users"]` (list 즉시 새 user pending 노출). **Verification:** vitest 58/58 PASS (§11.115 28 + §11.116 30), §11.105 dark guard PASS, §11.103 orphan-caller guard PASS (`/api/admin/users/invite` URL 매치). **LabAxis 원칙 준수:** mock 0 (real Prisma User create + real audit log), no fake success (loading/error/success 3 state honest, Clipboard API 실패 시도 graceful), dead button 0 (저장 button validation+pending dual disabled), canonical truth (User 모델 직접 create — token DB store 0), governance 분리 (admin write only). **OAuth 활성화 흐름 (canonical):** invite link `/auth/signin?email=<encoded>` → 받은 user 가 Google 로그인 → NextAuth jwt callback 의 dbUser link 분기 → `dbUser.emailVerified === null` true → `db.user.update({emailVerified: new Date(), ...})` 실행 → status "pending" → "active" 자동 전환 (§11.114 deriveStatus 가 emailVerified 기반). **Out of scope (별도 트랙):** (a) `#admin-user-invite-email-send` (옵션 B) — Resend/SendGrid 통합 + env 설정 + 도메인 verification (호영님 prod scale-up 시점). (b) `#admin-user-invite-token-revoke` — invite revoke (현재는 admin 이 user delete 로 effect 등치). (c) `#admin-user-invite-history` — invite 발급/사용 history view (audit log 검색 helper). (d) `#admin-user-invite-bulk-csv` — CSV upload 일괄 초대. **Lesson:** "fake-success 회귀 위험" 의 phase 0 audit 의 first quality gate 가치 — email sender fake 발견 + auth.ts jwt callback 의 emailVerified 누락 발견. 두 발견 없이 endpoint 만 만들었으면 (a) fake email 도달, (b) status pending 영구 두 회귀 surface. minimal-diff 방식 (link-only + auth.ts 1-line patch) 가 두 회귀 모두 sidestep + dependency 0. NextAuth callback 변경은 risky 하지만 `!dbUser.emailVerified` 가드 분기로 기존 user 영향 0 — invited user 만 첫 OAuth 시 자동 활성화.
- 2026-04-29 — **§11.115 OPENED and CLOSED:** `#admin-user-approval-policy-set-surface` — §11.97 schema 의 admin write 분기 land. P1 lifecycle 마무리 (schema → admin write → settings read display 자동 반영). 호영님 "진입해" 후속. **Phase 1 RED:** `apps/web/src/__tests__/api/admin/users-approval-policy.test.ts` 신규 (~210 lines, 28 tests) — `normalizeApprovalPolicyInput` helper unit tests 22 (approvalLimit null/empty/whitespace/0/콤마/음수/non-numeric/non-integer + costCenter trim/null + defaultLocation trim + combined input 정상/reset) + endpoint source contract 6 (파일 존재 / PATCH export / isAdmin guard / helper 사용 / USER_UPDATED audit / BigInt serialize / auth() session). 첫 run "Failed to resolve import" → real RED. **Phase 2 GREEN:** (a) `apps/web/src/lib/admin/approval-policy.ts` 신규 (~125 lines) — pure function `normalizeApprovalPolicyInput` + `ApprovalPolicyValidationError` class. approvalLimit (string/number/bigint/null), costCenter (trim), defaultLocation (trim) 3 input → ApprovalPolicyNormalized shape. 콤마 입력 (`100,000,000`) 운영자 친화.
